ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #123-4567890-1234567 has shipped
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order #123-4567890-1234567 has been shipped and is on its way to you.

• Item: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
• Quantity: 1
• Order Total: $89.99

Estimated Delivery: 3–5 business days.

You can track your shipment at <URL>.

If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email or contact our customer service.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon Delivery Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet #XYZ123 is Suspended – Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Wallet Owner,

We have detected unusual activity in your crypto wallet (Account ID: XYZ123). As a security measure, your wallet has been temporarily suspended.

To restore access, you must verify your identity immediately. Click the link below to complete the verification process:

<URL>

Failure to verify within 24 hours will result in permanent deactivation of the wallet and potential loss of funds.

Please treat this matter with the utmost urgency.

Sincerely,
CryptoSecure Support
